title: Wastewater - Canada.ca
content:
## Services and information

### Wastewater regulations overview
Information for wastewater systems owners and operators. Overview of requirements, factsheets, videos and other resources.

### Wastewater data and annual reports
Find out more about the information reported by owners and operators of wastewater systems under the Regulations.
Read the Regulations and review recent changes.

### Bilateral agreements
Administrative agreements and equivalency agreements.
Information for wastewater systems owners and operators about reporting under the Regulations.
List of transitional and temporary authorizations issued under the Regulations.

### Amendments to the Regulations
Information on the recent changes to the Regulations

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
